name: teams-multi-tenancy
intent: Implement a multi-tenant data model with User, Tenant, Tenant_Member, Billing_Account, Workspace, Project, and App entities. Support many-to-many user-tenant relationships with roles, tenant-owned billing accounts with Stripe integration references, and a workspace → project → app containment hierarchy. Billing accounts can pay for workspaces across tenants.

indicators: Pure data modeling - entities, relationships, business rules
No external API calls - stripe_customer_id is just a foreign key reference
Multi-tenancy is a local authorization/data partitioning concern
Role-based access via Tenant_Member junction table
uncertainties: Will this integrate with actual Stripe API later? (hybrid potential)
SSO settings on Tenant - does this call external IdP?
Credits balance - is this just a counter or tied to usage metering?
